title: Tamil Service Promotion Banner Design
brief: I need six banners ( design only), all fully in Tamil, to advertise a service in a clearly traditional style. The breakdown of sizes is: • 10 × 10 ft – 3 pieces • 10 × 20 ft – 2 pieces • 10 × 6 ft – 1 piece The message and copy will be supplied in Tamil; the design must respect local cultural aesthetics while remaining eye-catching from a distance. Please create clean, high-resolution artwork ready for large-format printing and include editable source files (AI or PSD) alongside final PDFs/JPEGs. Color mode should be CMYK, 150 dpi minimum at full scale, with 1 inch bleed all around. Acceptance will be based on: • Accurate Tamil typography with no spelling errors • Consistent traditional look across every size • Print-ready files that meet the stated specs Kindly allow for a round of minor revisions after I review the first draft.
